calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: July 13, 2006, Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Respondent, Mike Sevik appears in Pro Per. Appellant Nina Guralnik did not respond to roll call.
9:10am
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. There being no appearance by Appellant, by 9:15am, the matter is dismissed due to no appearance.
9:30am
Ms. Guralnik appears. The Court informs Ms. Gurlnik she was previoulsy told no further continuances of her matter would be allowed, and that the matter was dismissed at 9:15am.
11:02am
Judge Myles swears in the clerk, who testifies that no one approached the clerk on Ms. Guralnik's behalf, at the time the calendar was called; and that no one responded on her behalf at the time the stipulation and order to allow a Judge Pro Tem hear the case was being signd. (Ms. Guralnik represented to the Court that she had been in the women's bathroom, sick, and had sent a representative into court at 9am to tell the Court she was present.)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for continued Small Claims appeal. Parties had previously signed a stip and order to allow the matter to be heard before Judge Myles. Respondent Mike Sevik appears in Pro Per, but there is no appearance by appellant Nina Guralik. There being no appearance by the appellant, the appeal is dismissed.
9:53am
The Clerk gets a phone call from the SCA appeals section telling the Court that appellant was not able to get to court due to an accident. The clerk also listened to a message left on Dept. 525 phone from the appellant, at around the same time. The Court had already ruled on the matter by that time and Judge Myles would not reverse his earlier ruling.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-01-2006 Continued To Apr-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES
MIKE SEVIK - Respondent- pro per; present; sworn; witnesses sworn but did not testify
NINA GURALNIK - Appellant - pro per; present; sworn

This matter came on regularly for a trial de novo. Due to the reasons given by Appellant Guralnik, Court continued matter to Thursday, April 6th @ 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 525. Court ordered Appellant Guralnik to produce witnesses on 4/6; Court waived appearances of respondent Sevik's witnesses on 4/6 but to have sworn declarations of said witnesses on trial date.

JPT: ELLIOTT A. MYLES; CLERK: RANI EDWARDS; NOT REPORTED ( D525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Continued To Mar-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
